name: Prize Coconut Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 Cups Sifted Swans Down Cake Flour
2/3 Cup Baker's Fine Grated or Angel Flake Coconut
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure sifted flour, baking powder, and salt. Sift together.
2. Cream butter until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add sugar and cream until light and smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Alternately add the flour mixture and milk, beating after each addition until smooth.
6. Stir in vanilla and coconut.
7. Pour batter into two 8-inch layer pans lined on the bottom with wax paper.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 30 to 35 minutes.
9. Cool in pans for 10 minutes. Then remove from pans and finish cooling on racks.
